sourcesContent:
import { Component, signal, HostListener } from '@angular/core'; import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common'; import { Router, RouterModule } from '@angular/router'; export type UserRole = 'guest' | 'student' | 'teacher' | 'parent' | 'admin'; export type UserVm = { id: string; firstName: string; lastName: string; email: string; role: UserRole; }; @Component({ selector: 'app-navbar', standalone: true, imports: [CommonModule, RouterModule], templateUrl: './navbar.component.html', styleUrls: ['./navbar.component.scss'] }) export class NavbarComponent { isScrolled = signal(false); isMobileMenuOpen = signal(false); isLoggedIn = signal(false); currentUser = signal(null); userInitials = () => { const user = this.currentUser(); if (!user) return ''; return `${user.firstName.charAt(0)}${user.lastName.charAt(0)}`.toUpperCase(); }; userRole = () => this.currentUser()?.role ?? 'guest'; @HostListener('window:scroll', []) onWindowScroll() { this.isScrolled.set(window.scrollY > 50); } toggleMobileMenu() { this.isMobileMenuOpen.update(v => !v); } closeMobileMenu() { this.isMobileMenuOpen.set(false); } logout() { this.currentUser.set(null); this.isLoggedIn.set(false); this.router.navigate(['/']); this.closeMobileMenu(); } constructor(private router: Router) {} }
